nodes.name: Dockerfile.hdfs
nodes.summary: Multi-stage Dockerfile that builds a RisingWave image with HDFS support, installing Java, Hadoop, and HDFS native libraries alongside the RisingWave binary.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: User guide for running RisingWave via Docker Compose, covering playground mode, various storage backends (MinIO, S3, Azure Blob, GCS), image publishing, and docker-compose.yml generation.

nodes.name: aws.env
nodes.summary: Environment variable file supplying AWS credentials and region configuration (AWS_REGION, AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY) for RisingWave containers using S3 storage.

nodes.name: crypto.sql
nodes.summary: Demo SQL script defining an ERC-20 token transfer source table and materialized views for real-time crypto transfer analytics using Kafka and RisingWave.

nodes.name: erc20_transfers
nodes.summary: Core table/source definition for ERC-20 token transfer events, capturing address, amount, chain, from/to address, block number, and transaction metadata.

nodes.name: erc20_transfers_source
nodes.summary: Kafka source table for ingesting ERC-20 transfer events in real time, acting as the streaming input for the crypto analytics demo.

nodes.name: docker-compose-distributed.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose configuration for running RisingWave in distributed mode with separate frontend, compute, meta, compactor, and MinIO storage services.

nodes.name: docker-compose-with-azblob.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose configuration for running RisingWave with Azure Blob Storage as the object store backend.

nodes.name: docker-compose-with-gcs.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose configuration for running RisingWave with Google Cloud Storage as the object store backend.

nodes.name: docker-compose-with-hdfs.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose configuration for running RisingWave with HDFS as the storage backend, including NameNode and DataNode services.

nodes.name: docker-compose-with-lakekeeper.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose configuration for running RisingWave with Lakekeeper (Apache Iceberg REST catalog) integration, including catalog, MinIO, and Postgres services.

nodes.name: docker-compose-with-local-fs.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose configuration for running RisingWave with the local filesystem as the storage backend, suitable for development and testing.

nodes.name: docker-compose-with-obs.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose configuration for running RisingWave with Huawei OBS (Object Storage Service) as the object store backend.

nodes.name: docker-compose-with-oss.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose configuration for running RisingWave with Alibaba Cloud OSS (Object Storage Service) as the object store backend.

nodes.name: docker-compose-with-s3.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose configuration for running RisingWave with AWS S3 as the object store backend.

nodes.name: docker-compose-with-sqlite.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose configuration for running RisingWave with SQLite as the metadata store backend, suitable for lightweight deployments.

nodes.name: grafana-risedev-dashboard.yml
nodes.summary: Grafana dashboard provisioning configuration that registers the RisingWave risedev dashboard directory as a dashboard provider.

nodes.name: grafana-risedev-datasource.yml
nodes.summary: Grafana datasource provisioning configuration that registers Prometheus as the data source for the RisingWave monitoring dashboard.

nodes.name: grafana.ini
nodes.summary: Minimal Grafana server configuration disabling authentication for local development and Docker Compose deployments of RisingWave.

nodes.name: hdfs_env.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that sets HDFS-related environment variables (JAVA_HOME, HADOOP_HOME, LD_LIBRARY_PATH) needed by the RisingWave container when using the HDFS storage backend.

nodes.name: multiple_object_storage.env
nodes.summary: Environment variable file with credentials and endpoints for multiple object storage providers (S3, GCS, OSS, OBS, Azure Blob) for testing multi-backend support.

nodes.name: prometheus.yaml
nodes.summary: Prometheus scrape configuration for collecting RisingWave metrics from the meta, frontend, compute, and compactor service endpoints.
